title: kobresia stenocarpa var. royleana
intro: Kobresia stenocarpa var. royleana, also known as Royle's Kobresia or Kobresia royleana, is a type of sedge plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Kobresia stenocarpa var. royleana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
